name: io.github.loop-xxi/loop-mcp
title: loop-mcp
description: L402-native Bitcoin/Lightning MCP server. 5 pay-per-call tools for AI agents at 10–25 sats/call via Lightning Network: BTC price, fee send-decision (SEND_NOW/WAIT/URGENT_ONLY), Lightning Address resolver, TX decoder with agent-ready summary, and optimal send window. No API keys, no accounts required.
